title: microlicia bahiensis
intro: Microlicia bahiensis, also known as the Bahian microlicia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Microlicia bahiensis are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for consumption, or used in the form of ointments or salves for topical application.
